name: Nadia Ferreira

statedReqs.notes: Job transfer in 10 weeks. Wants speed over top dollar, but won't say the floor out loud.

hiddenPrefs.desc: Her real floor is 8% under ask — below that she'd rather rent it out and deal with tenants from another state.

intro: Selling the Fernwell house she renovated herself. Every scratch on those floors has a story and a defensiveness.

issues.desc: Deck boards soft at the far corner
Water heater at year 14 of a 12-year life
